- update to head
- delete last Unreal Engine folder
- update to have a clean folder without ignored files
- make a patch of modifications
- branch to a new folder for the new version
- update ( maybe not needed )
- delete the new Unreal Engine folder ( maybe not needed )
- copy the downloaded source to the new Unreal Engine folder
- switch to the new folder
- update the Video6DOF plugin
- commit the new Unreal Engine folder
- apply the patch of modifications
- commit the new Unreal Engine folder
